_comment: Slide deck template v1. Hybrid approach: (1) pptx_template defines the visual layout — slide master, fonts, colors, placeholder positions. (2) slides defines content structure — what goes on each slide, which data source feeds it, and where the Gantt image is inserted. Edit here to change slide order, content, or layout without touching the Python script.

meta.description: Standard project introduction slide deck template. Controls slide order, content mapping, and Gantt image insertion.

sources._comment: Files the script reads to populate slide content. Paths are relative to the project root.

gantt_image._comment: Controls how the Gantt Timeline is exported from Excel and inserted into the slide. Uses xlwings COM automation (Windows + Excel required).
gantt_image._note: row_end and col_end null means export the full used range of the sheet.

style._comment: Visual style settings applied when no pptx_template is found — fallback only. When pptx_template exists, colors and fonts come from the template file.

slides.name: Title
slides.title: {project_name}
slides.subtitle: Project Introduction — {date}
slides.speaker_notes: Welcome and introduce the project. State the project name, sponsor, and today's date.

slides.name: Why This Project
slides.title: Why This Project Matters
slides.speaker_notes: Explain the business problem this project solves and the value it delivers.

slides.name: Scope and Deliverables
slides.title: Scope and Expected Deliverables
slides.speaker_notes: Cover what is in scope and the must-have deliverables. Briefly note what is out of scope.

slides.name: Success Criteria
slides.title: Success Criteria and Acceptance
slides.speaker_notes: Walk through how success will be measured and who approves each criterion.

slides.name: Gantt Timeline
slides.title: Project Timeline
slides.speaker_notes: Walk through the project timeline. Highlight the critical path, parallel tracks, and any at-risk tasks.

slides.name: Key Milestones
slides.title: Key Milestones
slides.speaker_notes: Highlight the key approval gates and fixed deadlines. Call out any milestone with approval needed.

slides.name: Workstreams and Tasks
slides.title: Workstreams and Task Summary
slides.speaker_notes: Summarise the main work packages. Keep it high level — detail is in the Gantt.

slides.name: Roles and Responsibilities
slides.title: Roles and Responsibilities
slides.speaker_notes: Introduce the team. Highlight any resource constraints or single points of failure.

slides.name: Risks and Mitigation
slides.title: Risks and Mitigation Plan
slides.speaker_notes: Cover the top risks and how they are being managed. Focus on High severity items.

slides.name: Open Decisions
slides.title: Open Decisions and Information Needed

content_source.section: 20. Open questions before final Gantt chart

slides.speaker_notes: These are the decisions that need to be made before the project can proceed. Assign owners in the room.

slides.name: Next Steps
slides.title: Recommended Next Steps
slides.speaker_notes: Close with concrete actions and owners. Confirm who does what and by when before leaving the room.
